name: swibe-sacred-kit
description: Technosis & OSO Extension Kit for Swibe

technosis_translator.purpose: Ritual bridge from Swibe to OSOVM opcodes (@impact, @tithe, etc.)

twilio_call.purpose: Voice calls for minting events and agent communication

usage.sacred_mint:
load skill "technosis_translator"
load skill "twilio_call"
ritual("@impact(ase=0.5)")
outbound("+123", "Àṣẹ sealed")
